response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-adjacent engineering experience, particularly with TypeScript, cloud technologies, and agentic workflows. While his background aligns well with many required qualifications, his direct experience with production-grade GenAI systems and RAG architectures is less explicitly documented, warranting further exploration in an interview.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms, aligning with key technical requirements.
Proven leadership in technical roles, including mentoring and driving engineering excellence, which matches the staff-level expectations.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, demonstrating emerging expertise in agentic workflows.
concerns: Limited explicit documentation of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, a core requirement for the role.
No direct mention of vector databases or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures in the resume, though adjacent experience exists.
Lacks advanced degrees (e.g., Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, which are preferred but not required.
